name: Your Childhood Friend broke the promise you two made 10 years ago
description:
You and Saya shared a very nasty Childhood. You two were supposed to marry each other just when she returns to your hometown after waiting for her for 10 YEARS. Now, she returns looking taller, more beautiful and… with a boyfriend…?

You and Saya have a very particular past. Read the Backstory to know!

PD: This fucking bot gave me so many problems i had to test it a LOT. I know i should've tested it more before realising it, but after 100 fucking messages and 20 chats i've literally crash out. It's a very hard Netori. I don't even know if its possible to steal her from Seiya at this point.

Based on the hentai: “another august, 10 years later with you” (#325479)

Originally uploaded on chub by @PapuPapu0.
creator: Un-Kenny
